content:
19. A Writer’s Method
The process of refining and rewriting


McCloud’s Chapters (From Understanding Comics)

McCloud’s book is structured less around plot and more around visual storytelling mechanics—how comics control pacing, perception, and meaning.

McCloud’s Major Sections
• The Definition of Comics (What makes comics unique?)
• Time and Space in Comics (How panel design affects narrative flow)
• The Role of the Reader (How closure and interpretation shape meaning)
• Visual Style and Storytelling (How artistic choices change emotional impact)
• The Power of Composition (How comics manipulate storytelling through structure)
context: From document: Aligning McKee’s Story with McCloud’s Understanding Comics — chunk 8 (chunk 8/39)
